'''Casfield 6''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Casfield system/Legends|Casfield system]]. Incoming [[Starship/Legends|starship]] traffic was managed by [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. A six-ship collision resulted in the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the 6,000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|year]] old [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] of the [[Offen]]s.

*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1stm}}
